pages.text: It was summer time and most of the ants in Ant City were collecting food. But Lazy Ant was lying on his back on top of a rock basking in the sun.

blocks.text: It was summer time and most of the ants in Ant City were collecting food.
But Lazy Ant was lying on his back on top of a rock basking in the sun.

pages.text: As Lazy Ant’s mother and sisters were busy collecting food, he just glanced at them, whistling and waiting for them to finish.

blocks.text: As Lazy Ant’s mother and sisters were busy collecting food, he just glanced at them, whistling and waiting for them to finish.

pages.text: But when it was time to eat, Lazy Ant would suddenly jump up.

blocks.text: But when it was time to eat, Lazy Ant would suddenly jump up.

pages.text: Lazy Ant always complained when he was given work to do. In fact, he was so lazy that he would even cry! Instead of working, Lazy Ant would chat non-stop, and so when it was time to go home, his work was left unfinished.

blocks.text: Lazy Ant always complained when he was given work to do. In fact, he was so lazy that he would even cry!
Instead of working, Lazy Ant would chat non-stop, and so when it was time to go home, his work was left unfinished.

pages.text: One day Lazy Ant’s mother found him sitting on a rock as usual.

blocks.text: One day Lazy Ant’s mother found him sitting on a rock as usual.

pages.text: His mother was angry and she punished him. Then she told him to quickly fill a sack with food. Lazy Ant grumbled as he began working. He knew that he would not be getting any food if he didn’t work.

blocks.text: His mother was angry and she punished him.
Then she told him to quickly fill a sack with food. Lazy Ant grumbled as he began working. He knew that he would not be getting any food if he didn’t work.

pages.text: By the end of that day, Lazy Ant’s sack was full. His mother was very happy to see that her son had worked so hard.

blocks.text: By the end of that day, Lazy Ant’s sack was full. His mother was very happy to see that her son had worked so hard.

pages.text: Lazy Ant’s mother prepared a special meal for supper to reward her son. He enjoyed the meal along with the other ants who had worked hard all day.

blocks.text: Lazy Ant’s mother prepared a special meal for supper to reward her son. He enjoyed the meal along with the other ants who had worked hard all day.

pages.text: The next morning, Lazy Ant was the first one to wake up and he prepared breakfast for his mother.

blocks.text: The next morning, Lazy Ant was the first one to wake up and he prepared breakfast for his mother.

pages.text: All the other ants were shocked by the change in Lazy Ant’s behaviour. He went up and down offering help to any ant who needed it.

blocks.text: All the other ants were shocked by the change in Lazy Ant’s behaviour. He went up and down offering help to any ant who needed it.

pages.text: The elders of Ant City even celebrated the change in Lazy Ant’s behaviour with him.

blocks.text: The elders of Ant City even celebrated the change in Lazy Ant’s behaviour with him.

pages.text: And from that day, Lazy Ant saw the importance of working together with others. Working together creates peace, joy and harmony.
